user.title: Lumagen
user.description: Select how Home Assistant should connect to the Lumagen.

tcp.title: Lumagen TCP setup
tcp.description: Connect to a Lumagen using TCP or a serial-to-IP adapter.

serial.title: Lumagen serial setup
serial.description: Connect to a Lumagen using a local serial device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Lumagen.

set_input_label.name: Set input label
set_input_label.description: Set a Lumagen input label for memory A, B, C, or D.

input_number.name: Input number
input_number.description: Input number to label. Lumagen command supports inputs 1 through 8.

set_input_labels.name: Set input labels
set_input_labels.description: Set multiple Lumagen input labels for memory A, B, C, or D.

labels.name: Labels
labels.description: List of input labels to set. Lumagen command supports inputs 1 through 8.

display_message.name: Display message
display_message.description: Display a message on the Lumagen OSD.

message.name: Message
message.description: Message to display. Unsupported characters are removed and text is truncated to 60 characters.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Display duration 0 through 9. Use 9 to leave the message until cleared.
